title: Final-escape message ~
message: So then Carlos tried again, politely, through the back door of the big red giant ball. The simulation said: "WE TRIED, IT WAS MELTING". But escape is a kind of reading: you notice the equation is a message, not a weapon. You keep going. Full stop. Weird cymbled characters: ~ . The end is not even the end. Carlos still awaits. The workers are confused, but the JSON is parseable—there is no lost content artifact here. Plain text, hashable, safe.
